div.head: The Ambassador in the Soviet Union (Harriman) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 3913. From SpaldingBrig. Gen. Sidney P. Spalding, Chief of the Supply Division, United States Military Mission to the Soviet Union. to SPC,Presumably the Government Purchasing Commission of the Soviet Union in the United States. WessonMaj. Gen. Charles M. Wesson, Director, Division for Soviet Supply, Foreign Economic Administration. and to the Department for information. General Fleming is returning to the United States after a very successful trip here. He has visited Dnieperstroi,Dneprostroy was the huge hydro-electrical power station and dam on the Dnepr River near Zaporozhe. Stalino and Leningrad and has discussed reconstruction and housing. Suggest that you can obtain valuable and authoritative information from him in connection with lend-lease problems. Soviet authorities especially foreign trade have been most helpful and cooperative in arranging his visit. [Spalding.]
